description_long: This is a soft, cubic cushion with a smooth, fabric exterior and a playful, minimalist face design on one side. The face features two closed, upward-angled eyes and a wide, curved smile, giving it a cheerful and whimsical appearance. The cushion is uniformly white, with the facial features rendered in simple black lines. Its shape is slightly rounded at the edges, suggesting a plush and comfortable filling, likely polyester fiber or foam. The other sides of the cushion are plain, without any visible patterns or markings. This object would be inviting for sitting or lounging in casual urban spaces such as parks or community lounges.
description: A white, cubic cushion with a soft fabric exterior and a cheerful, minimalist face design on one side. The cushion appears plush and comfortable, ideal for casual seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cushion's playful face design with closed eyes and a wide smile.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, white fabric surface with no visible markings or patterns.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the unadorned, smooth white surface of the cushion.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also plain and white, with subtle fabric creases.
attribute_placement: placed directly on the ground or on a low platform for casual seating
